results.title: New to Product Hunt.... Building CitedSpy and Excited to Learn : Introduce yourself Discussion Forums | Product Hunt
results.content:
Arshita Sharma

@sabber\_ahamed .... Thanks, Sabber!

Right - each model behaves differently. A brand that shows up consistently in Perplexity may barely appear in ChatGPT, and vice versa.

We track both:

• Citation frequency - how often a brand is mentioned, cited, or recommended in each AI engine.

• Visibility quality - where and how it appears: sentiment, recommendation context, competitor share of voice, and the sources driving those mentions.

Frequency alone can mislead. One strong recommendation often matters more than five passing mentions.

The goal: not just "does AI know you" but "how does AI present you when buyers are deciding."

Have you noticed any model behaving very differently in your own testing?

Meicen med [...] Hi, I'm Arshita Sharma, founder of CitedSpy.

For over 10 years, I've worked across business development, growth, and digital marketing, helping companies get discovered and grow. Over the last couple of years, I noticed a major shift: buyers stopped relying only on Google and started asking ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and other AI assistants for recommendations.

The problem was simple: brands had no way to see what AI was saying about them.

That's why I built CitedSpy a platform that helps businesses track, monitor, and improve their visibility across AI search engines. We show where your brand is mentioned, cited, recommended, and where competitors are winning attention. [...] ### Topic Forums

Artem Brezhniev

Maker

@catt\_marroll Hi Matt,

We’re currently using LLM APIs to process user-defined prompts across different AI platforms. Basically, you can set up specific queries or scenarios you want to monitor like "best project management tools" or "top cybersecurity solutions" and we’ll feed those prompts into LLMs like ChatGPT, Claude, and others to see when and how your brand gets mentioned. •9 reviews [...] helps you monitor brand mentions and track brand visibility across generative AI platforms like Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, and more. This AI rank tracker uncovers which pages are cited in LLM responses, what answers are pulled, and how often your brand appears. That way, you can spot gaps, optimize your LLM visibility, and increase your brand mentions in AI search results. If you’re an SEO agency whose customers are increasingly asking questions about their AI search visibility, or you’re curious about how your own website is ranking, this product is for you. Originally intended to be an add-on purchase to a Keyword.com Google organic tracking package, due to high demand Keyword.com is releasing it as a standalone product and looking for feedback from early users to make it even

## Track how ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini talk about your brand

## Track how ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini talk about your brand

AI is becoming the new search. People ask ChatGPT for recommendations instead of Google. But do you know what AI says about your brand? AI Labs Audit scans 50+ AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Mistral...) and shows you exactly how your brand appears in their responses. Get actionable insights: Are you recommended? How do you rank vs competitors? What do AI models say about your products? White-label available for agencies and consultants.

Hey everyone! 👋 I built AI Labs Audit because I realized brands have zero visibility on what AI assistants say about them. SEO is great, but the game is changing. More people ask ChatGPT "what's the best CRM?" than search on Google. I wanted to know: does AI recommend my brand? What about my competitors? So I built a tool that queries 50+ AI models and gives you a clear report. Would love your feedback. What features would help you most?

Sergey [...] Hi Product Hunt - I built PromptScout because founders and lean marketing teams are starting to lose discovery to AI answers they cannot see in normal SEO dashboards. Google rankings still matter, but they no longer tell the whole story. Buyers now ask ChatGPT, Gemini, Google AI Overviews, and Perplexity for recommendations, comparisons, and shortlists. If your brand is missing there, a page-one ranking may not be enough. PromptScout starts with a free technical AI-readiness audit because that is the cheapest useful first check: can AI crawlers access the site, can the page be extracted, are important pages discoverable, and what should be fixed before running visibility monitoring? Live AI visibility data is gated behind signup so PromptScout can save the brand, prompts, monitor runs,
